9a518e6c-4c45-4e41-b1b1-123511b3535d.content:
# This file configures the analyzer, which statically analyzes Dart code to
# check for errors, warnings, and lints.
#
# The issues identified by the analyzer are surfaced in the UI of Dart-enabled
# IDEs (https://dart.dev/tools#ides-and-editors). The analyzer can also be
# invoked from the command line by running `flutter analyze`.

# The following line activates a set of recommended lints for Flutter apps,
# packages, and plugins designed to encourage good coding practices.
include: package:flutter_lints/flutter.yaml

linter:
  # The lint rules applied to this project can be customized in the
  # section below to disable rules from the `package:flutter_lints/flutter.yaml`
  # included above or to enable additional rules. A list of all available lints
  # and their documentation is published at https://dart.dev/lints.
  #
  # Instead of disabling a lint rule for the entire project in the
  # section below, it can also be suppressed for a single line of code
  # or a specific dart file by using the `// ignore: name_of_lint` and
  # `// ignore_for_file: name_of_lint` syntax on the line or in the file
  # producing the lint.
  rules:
    # avoid_print: false  # Uncomment to disable the `avoid_print` rule
    # prefer_single_quotes: true  # Uncomment to enable the `prefer_single_quotes` rule

# Additional information about this file can be found at
# https://dart.dev/guides/language/analysis-options

df63a2dd-5c87-467a-a440-5c32824d3308.content:
name: pet_verse
description: "A new Flutter project."
publish_to: "none"

version: 1.0.0+1

environment:
  sdk: ^3.11.3

dependencies:
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter



  cupertino_icons: ^1.0.8
  intl: ^0.20.2
  geolocator: ^14.0.2
  google_maps_flutter: ^2.6.0
  geocoding: ^4.0.0
  just_audio: ^0.9.36
  permission_handler: ^11.3.1
  table_calendar: ^3.1.0
  firebase_core: 2.22.0
  cloud_firestore: 4.12.2
  firebase_auth: 4.14.0
  google_sign_in: ^6.1.6  
  confetti: ^0.7.0

  # 🔥 NEW ADDED
  url_launcher: ^6.1.11
  scrollable_positioned_list: ^0.3.8
  image_picker: ^1.2.1
  country_picker: ^2.0.27
  country_state_city: ^0.1.6
  country_state_city_picker: ^1.2.8
  http: ^1.6.0
  dropdown_search: ^5.0.0

dev_dependencies:
  flutter_test:
    sdk: flutter
  flutter_lints: ^6.0.0

  # 🔥 App icon generator
  flutter_launcher_icons: ^0.13.1

flutter:
  uses-material-design: true

  assets:
    - assets/images/app_symbol.png
    - assets/images/pet_profile.png
    - assets/images/app_logo.png
    - assets/images/onboarding_page1.png
    - assets/images/onboarding_page2.png
    - assets/images/onboarding_page3.png
    - assets/images/onboarding_page4.png
    - assets/images/dog_illustration.png
    - assets/images/cat_illustration.png
    - assets/images/emergency_logo.png
    - assets/images/nearby_lost_and_found_logo.png
    - assets/images/booking_logo.png
    - assets/images/petcare_logo.png
    - assets/images/routine_logo.png
    - assets/images/vaccine_logo.png
    - assets/images/dog_feeding.jpg
    - assets/images/dog_grooming.jpg
    - assets/images/dog_tranning.jpg
    - assets/images/dog_walking.jpg
    - assets/images/petcare_behavior_screen.jpg
    - assets/images/petcare_obedience_screen.jpeg
    - assets/images/petcare_training_screen.jpg
    - assets/images/avoid.jpeg
    - assets/images/best.jpeg
    - assets/images/diet.jpg
    - assets/images/hydration.jpeg
    - assets/images/labrador.jpeg
    - assets/images/bull_dog.jpeg
    - assets/images/Golden_Retriever.jpeg
    - assets/images/sammy.jpeg
    - assets/images/sheru.jpeg



    

  fonts:
    - family: Poppins
      fonts:
        - asset: assets/fonts/Poppins-Regular.ttf
        - asset: assets/fonts/Poppins-Medium.ttf
          weight: 500
        - asset: assets/fonts/Poppins-SemiBold.ttf
          weight: 600

# 🔥 App Icon Configuration (VERY IMPORTANT - outside flutter)
flutter_launcher_icons:
  android: true
  ios: true
  image_path: "assets/images/app_symbol.png"
  adaptive_icon_background: "#FFFFFF"
  adaptive_icon_foreground: "assets/images/app_symbol.png"

# pet_verse

A new Flutter project.

## Getting Started

This project is a starting point for a Flutter application.

A few resources to get you started if this is your first Flutter project:

- [Learn Flutter](https://docs.flutter.dev/get-started/learn-flutter)
- [Write your first Flutter app](https://docs.flutter.dev/get-started/codelab)
- [Flutter learning resources](https://docs.flutter.dev/reference/learning-resources)

For help getting started with Flutter development, view the
[online documentation](https://docs.flutter.dev/), which offers tutorials,
samples, guidance on mobile development, and a full API reference.

ca521141-9411-41d0-9ad5-0e06c04e02dd.content:
# Launch Screen Assets

You can customize the launch screen with your own desired assets by replacing the image files in this directory.

You can also do it by opening your Flutter project's Xcode project with `open ios/Runner.xcworkspace`, selecting `Runner/Assets.xcassets` in the Project Navigator and dropping in the desired images.

#endif  // FLUTTER_MY_APPLICATION_H_

3c2a3506-edb7-47f7-b48b-11878892af7d.content:
# Lifera – Beginning of a Life

Lifera is a full-stack blood donation web application developed as part of a **Summer Internship**.  
The platform connects blood donors and recipients in real time to help reduce delays during medical emergencies.

---

## Project Links
- **GitHub Repository:** https://github.com/Anushka364/Internship-Lifera  
- **Live Demo:** https://internship-lifera.netlify.app  

---

## About the Project
Lifera enables users to register as blood donors, find nearby donors, and request blood during emergencies.  
The application focuses on secure authentication, real-time data handling, and a responsive interface to ensure reliability and ease of use.

---

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend:** React.js, Vite, JavaScript, CSS  
- **Backend & Services:** Firebase Authentication, Firebase Realtime Database  
- **Tools & Deployment:** GitHub, Netlify, VS Code  

---

## Key Features
- Donor registration and authentication  
- Real-time donor search  
- Emergency blood request system  
- Responsive and accessible UI  

---

## Internship Context
This project was developed during a **Summer Internship** to gain hands-on experience in:
- Full-stack web development  
- Firebase integration  
- Real-time application design  
- Deployment and version control  

---

import React from "react"; import "/src/styles/AboutUs.css"; // import team1 from "/src/images/team1.jpg"; // import team2 from "/src/images/team2.jpg"; const AboutUs = () => { return (
{/* HERO / INTRO */}

About Lifera

Lifera is a community-driven platform that connects blood donors with those in need — faster, safer, and smarter. Our mission is simple: ensure no life is lost for lack of blood.

{/* MISSION */}

Our Mission

We build a dependable network of donors and hospitals so emergency blood needs are met immediately. We combine verified donor profiles, location-based matching and community outreach to save lives.

{/* HOW IT WORKS */}

How Lifera Works

1

Request or Search

Post a blood requirement or search by blood group and location.

2

Match & Notify

Verified donors nearby receive instant notifications.

3

Connect & Confirm

Donor and requester coordinate donation and confirm the process.

4

Follow-up

Donation records, thank-you notes, and reminders for donors.

{/* FEATURES */}

What Lifera Offers

Real-Time Donor Tracking

Find available donors near you with instant location updates.

Emergency Requests

Request blood urgently and get matched with nearby volunteers quickly.

Awareness Drives

Join our blood donation awareness campaigns and make an impact.

{/* IMPACT / STATS */}

Our Impact So Far

10,000+
Registered Donors
4,500+
Donations Coordinated
1,200+
Requests Fulfilled
{/* TEAM */}

The Team Behind Lifera

Lifera is built by a small team of developers, volunteers and health advocates. We are students and professionals committed to making blood donation simple, safe and accessible.

{/* */}

Dyuti Saini

Frontend Developer

{/* */}

Aman Bharti

Frontend & Integrations

{/* */}

Anushka

Frontend & Integrations

{/* */}

Ankita

Frontend

{/* SAFETY */}

Safety & Verification

  • Donors can upload ID and donation history for verification.
  • Hospital partners are verified before listing.
  • We provide donation guidelines and follow-up reminders.
{/* CTA */}

Ready to save lives?

); }; export default AboutUs;

L i f e r a

You trusted hub for blood Detection, Donation and Safety

Why Choose Lifera?

Lifera connects blood donors and recipients seamlessly. Our mission is to ensure that no life is lost due to lack of blood availability — using real-time data, verified donors, and location-based matching.

Our Mission

Every second counts when it comes to saving lives. Lifera is built with the vision of creating a connected network of donors and recipients — ensuring that help is always just a click away.

What Lifera Offers

Find Nearby Donors

Locate verified blood donors instantly through real-time location tracking.

Register as a Donor

Join our community of heroes and save lives by becoming a registered donor.

Emergency Requests

Post urgent blood requests and get notified when a donor is available nearby.

Donation Events

Stay updated with upcoming blood donation camps and community drives.

Our Impact So Far

10,000+

Registered Donors

5,000+

Lives Saved

1,200+

Blood Requests Fulfilled

); }; export default Center;

Donate Blood, Save Lives

Your one donation can save up to 3 lives. Join our mission today!

Why Donate Blood?

{/* ❤️ Added icon */}

Save 3 Lives

One donation can save up to three lives.

{/* 🕒 Added icon */}

Always Needed

Every 2 seconds, blood is needed somewhere.

{/* 💓 Added icon */}

Health Benefits

Donating blood improves heart health and reduces stress.

{/* 🏅 Added icon */}

Be a Hero

You become someone’s hero by donating blood.

Eligibility Criteria

Check if you're eligible to donate blood and save lives
{/* 🗓️ Age */}

Age: 18–65 years

{/* ⚖️ Weight */}

Weight: 50 kg or above

{/* ❤️ Health */}

Health: Feeling healthy and fit

{/* 🛡️ Illness */}

Illness: No major illness in the past 6 months

{/* ✂️ Surgery */}

Surgery: No recent surgery or infection

{/* 🔁 Frequency */}

Frequency: Can donate again after 3 months

Donation Process

5 simple steps to become a life-saver

1

Register as a Donor

Fill out a simple form with your details

2

Find Nearby Blood Bank

Locate the nearest donation center

3

Book an Appointment

Choose a convenient time slot

4

Donate Safely

Quick and safe donation process

5

Receive Certificate

Get recognized for saving lives

Find Nearby Blood Banks

Locate the nearest blood donation center in your area

City Medical Center

📍 123 Health Street, Downtown

🕒 Mon–Sat: 9 AM – 6 PM

📞 +91-98765-43210

Community Blood Bank

📍 456 Care Avenue, Westside

🕒 Mon–Sun: 8 AM – 8 PM

📞 +91-98765-43211

Central Hospital

📍 789 Medical Plaza, Eastside

🕒 Mon–Fri: 10 AM – 5 PM

📞 +91-98765-43212

Register to Donate

Fill in your details and we'll help you save lives

{/* Safe Donation Section */}

Safe, Simple & Secure Donation

Safe & Sterile

All equipment is single use only to ensure your safety.

Quick Process

The entire donation process takes less than 15 minutes.

Regular Donation

You can donate again after 3 months.

Post-Donation Care

  • Stay hydrated – drink plenty of fluids for the next 24 hours.
  • Rest well and avoid strenuous activities for a few hours.
  • Eat a healthy meal and maintain an iron-rich diet.
  • Keep the bandage on for at least 4–6 hours.
{/* Our Impact Section */}

Our Impact

1,200+

Donors Registered

3,500+

Lives Saved

50+

Hospitals Connected

{/* Donor Stories */}

Donor Stories

“The donation drive was fulfilling — I felt proud to help save a life.”

Rajiv Kumar

Blood Donor

“The process is smooth and efficient. Highly recommend donating!”

Ananya Singh

NGO Volunteer

“It’s so easy to register and donate — everyone should do it!”

Priya Sharma

First Time Donor
{/* Contact Section */} {/*

Need Help or Want to Partner with Us?

We're here to assist you with any questions or partnerships.

📞 +91-98765-43210

📧 support@lifera.org

© 2025 Lifera. Donate Blood. Save Lives.

*/}
); }; export default Donate;

The entire donation process takes less than 15 minutes.

Regular Donation

You can donate again after 3 months.

Post-Donation Care

  • Stay hydrated – drink plenty of fluids for the next 24 hours.
  • Rest well and avoid strenuous activities for a few hours.
  • Eat a healthy meal and maintain an iron-rich diet.
  • Keep the bandage on for at least 4–6 hours.

c122d2eb-230e-45a7-872c-2ea658f23970.content:
# Lifera – Beginning of a Life

Lifera is a full-stack blood donation web application developed as part of a **Summer Internship**.  
The platform connects blood donors and recipients in real time to help reduce delays during medical emergencies.

---

## Project Links
- **GitHub Repository:** https://github.com/Anushka364/Internship-Lifera  
- **Live Demo:** https://internship-lifera.netlify.app  

---

## About the Project
Lifera enables users to register as blood donors, find nearby donors, and request blood during emergencies.  
The application focuses on secure authentication, real-time data handling, and a responsive interface to ensure reliability and ease of use.

---

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend:** React.js, Vite, JavaScript, CSS  
- **Backend & Services:** Firebase Authentication, Firebase Realtime Database  
- **Tools & Deployment:** GitHub, Netlify, VS Code  

---

## Key Features
- Donor registration and authentication  
- Real-time donor search  
- Emergency blood request system  
- Responsive and accessible UI  

---

## Internship Context
This project was developed during a **Summer Internship** to gain hands-on experience in:
- Full-stack web development  
- Firebase integration  
- Real-time application design  
- Deployment and version control  

---

import React from "react"; import "/src/styles/AboutUs.css"; // import team1 from "/src/images/team1.jpg"; // import team2 from "/src/images/team2.jpg"; const AboutUs = () => { return (
{/* HERO / INTRO */}

About Lifera

Lifera is a community-driven platform that connects blood donors with those in need — faster, safer, and smarter. Our mission is simple: ensure no life is lost for lack of blood.

{/* MISSION */}

Our Mission

We build a dependable network of donors and hospitals so emergency blood needs are met immediately. We combine verified donor profiles, location-based matching and community outreach to save lives.

{/* HOW IT WORKS */}

How Lifera Works

1

Request or Search

Post a blood requirement or search by blood group and location.

2

Match & Notify

Verified donors nearby receive instant notifications.

3

Connect & Confirm

Donor and requester coordinate donation and confirm the process.

4

Follow-up

Donation records, thank-you notes, and reminders for donors.

{/* FEATURES */}

What Lifera Offers

Real-Time Donor Tracking

Find available donors near you with instant location updates.

Emergency Requests

Request blood urgently and get matched with nearby volunteers quickly.

Awareness Drives

Join our blood donation awareness campaigns and make an impact.

{/* IMPACT / STATS */}

Our Impact So Far

10,000+
Registered Donors
4,500+
Donations Coordinated
1,200+
Requests Fulfilled
{/* TEAM */}

The Team Behind Lifera

Lifera is built by a small team of developers, volunteers and health advocates. We are students and professionals committed to making blood donation simple, safe and accessible.

{/* */}

Dyuti Saini

Frontend Developer

{/* */}

Aman Bharti

Frontend & Integrations

{/* */}

Anushka

Frontend & Integrations

{/* */}

Ankita

Frontend

{/* SAFETY */}

Safety & Verification

  • Donors can upload ID and donation history for verification.
  • Hospital partners are verified before listing.
  • We provide donation guidelines and follow-up reminders.
{/* CTA */}

Ready to save lives?

); }; export default AboutUs;

Donate Blood, Save Lives

Your one donation can save up to 3 lives. Join our mission today!

Why Donate Blood?

{/* ❤️ Added icon */}

Save 3 Lives

One donation can save up to three lives.

{/* 🕒 Added icon */}

Always Needed

Every 2 seconds, blood is needed somewhere.

{/* 💓 Added icon */}

Health Benefits

Donating blood improves heart health and reduces stress.

{/* 🏅 Added icon */}

Be a Hero

You become someone’s hero by donating blood.

Eligibility Criteria

Check if you're eligible to donate blood and save lives
{/* 🗓️ Age */}

Age: 18–65 years

{/* ⚖️ Weight */}

Weight: 50 kg or above

{/* ❤️ Health */}

Health: Feeling healthy and fit

{/* 🛡️ Illness */}

Illness: No major illness in the past 6 months

{/* ✂️ Surgery */}

Surgery: No recent surgery or infection

{/* 🔁 Frequency */}

Frequency: Can donate again after 3 months

Donation Process

5 simple steps to become a life-saver

1

Register as a Donor

Fill out a simple form with your details

2

Find Nearby Blood Bank

Locate the nearest donation center

3

Book an Appointment

Choose a convenient time slot

4

Donate Safely

Quick and safe donation process

5

Receive Certificate

Get recognized for saving lives
